title: Luffy Sees the Maps
description: On pages 5–8, luffy sees the maps focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Nojiko as luffy discovers the room where Nami was forced to draw maps and turns his anger on Arlong Park itself.
scene: On pages 5–8, luffy sees the maps focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Nojiko as luffy discovers the room where Nami was forced to draw maps and turns his anger on Arlong Park itself.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The hell do you think you're doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy...?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: What's with all these things being thrown outta there?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: From today on, this'll be your room!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And over there's your desk and pen!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: anything that you might possibly need is all here!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Stop that already!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Aghh!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Nghhh!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: M-My maps...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Don't you ever even think of tricking me, you little brat!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: How dare you draw fake maps...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Aghhh!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Here's the data for your next task. Turn all of it into maps!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And don't you dare leave your room until you're finished, you hear!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Those maps took Nami 8 years to draw, you bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ugh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Bellie- mere...!

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: Nojiko...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Shaha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Arghhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Seems like an intense fight is going on up there.

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
